---
title: "Power Analysis"
author: "Francesca Capuano"
date: today
bibliography: ../references.bib
csl: apa.csl
---

# Power Analysis

See @brysbaert2019many for practical guidelines on statistical power and sample size in psycholinguistic research.

# Example of a power analysis with simulations for acceptability judgments:
# https://rpubs.com/masashiharada/contextualeffectscase-powercalculation
```{r, message=FALSE}
library(simr)

```
